overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through an industrial district of Night City during a hazy dusk. The environment features towering smokestacks, elevated highways with large digital billboards, and sparse pedestrian and vehicular traffic, rendered with high-fidelity game engine graphics and a warm, orange-tinged atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district sidewalk alongside elevated highway

events.description: black sedan passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk through the industrial district, passing street lights and concrete barriers

entered.detail: large industrial structure with metal scaffolding and corrugated panels
tall industrial chimneys emitting dark smoke into the hazy sky
raised concrete highway or monorail track running parallel to the sidewalk
tall metal pole with horizontal light fixture extending over the road
metal safety barrier separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an industrial sidewalk during dusk, with towering smokestacks visible in the hazy distance. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right while a guardrail separates the walkway from the sparse traffic on the left. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with large digital advertisements

events.description: pedestrian in orange jacket appears walking in the opposite direction
ego passes the pedestrian in orange jacket

agents.ego_description: walking past large digital billboards on the right, encountering and passing a pedestrian in an orange jacket walking the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing orange jacket and green pants walking toward the camera then passing by on the left

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying red and blue 'BURGUS BOLL' advertisement with star graphic
overhead gantry sign with 'Highway' and 'Jones' directional indicators
large curved metal pipes running along the elevated structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as a massive digital billboard displaying 'BURGUS BOLL' dominates the right side of the frame. A pedestrian in an orange jacket approaches from the opposite direction and passes by. Overhead, a highway direction sign becomes visible against the hazy orange sky, while industrial piping runs along the elevated structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach with corporate signage and increased pedestrian activity

events.description: character stops walking and turns left to observe the street traffic and Delamain sign

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection with increased pedestrian activity, then stopping and turning to observe the Delamain corporate sign and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: line of cars with brake lights illuminated driving along the road and stopping at the intersection

entered.detail: large corporate billboard structure with 'DELAMAIN' text and logo spanning over the roadway
vertical digital billboard displaying a portrait of a person's face
pedestrian bridge or overhead walkway structure crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a busier intersection where the prominent 'DELAMAIN' corporate sign spans across the road ahead. More pedestrians are visible walking in the same direction, and traffic density increases with multiple cars visible on the left. The character stops and turns to observe the scene, revealing a large digital screen displaying a face on the right and the industrial skyline in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial corridor that gradually transitions into a bustling corporate intersection. It begins with a character walking along a quiet sidewalk flanked by a guardrail and towering smokestacks that fade into a hazy dusk. As the character progresses, the environment becomes more visually dense, passing under a massive Burgus Boll digital billboard and a highway direction sign while a lone pedestrian in an orange jacket crosses their path. The scene then opens up into a busier district where the corporate Delamain sign spans the road and traffic density increases with multiple cars appearing on the left. Finally, the character stops and turns, revealing a large digital screen displaying a face against the backdrop of the sprawling industrial skyline.
